blocks.name: hero-carousel
blocks.description: Full-width hero section with rotating slides, each containing a background image, heading, description, and CTA. Supports dot indicators and optional thumbnail navigation strip.

blocks.name: news-carousel
blocks.description: Horizontal scrolling carousel of news/press-release cards. Each card has an image, title (H6), optional description, and CTA link. Includes Previous/Next arrows and a 'see more' link.

blocks.name: feature-banner
blocks.description: Full-width text banner with dark/gradient background. Contains heading, description paragraph, and CTA link. Used for AI Feature Banner and Services Banner sections.

blocks.name: card-carousel
blocks.description: Card carousel with background images. Each slide has a background image, heading, description text, and CTA link. Includes slide indicators and arrow navigation.

blocks.name: solutions-grid
blocks.description: Grid of solution tiles with header. Each tile is a linked card with background image/gradient, heading, description, and CTA text. Supports 3+2 and other responsive grid layouts.

blocks.name: greenlake-promo
blocks.description: Two-panel promotional section. Left panel has logo, description, and video thumbnail with play button. Right panel has product screenshot, heading, and CTA link.

blocks.name: customer-stories
blocks.description: Tabbed section showcasing customer case studies. Tab bar selects between stories. Each story panel contains intro with video CTA, objectives, outcomes list, quote with attribution, solution details, and a bottom CTA.

blocks.name: product-cards
blocks.description: Responsive grid of product cards. Each card has a full-width image, heading, description, and CTA link. Supports 2-column and 3-column layouts.

blocks.name: section-header
blocks.description: Simple section introduction with heading and description paragraph. May include inline links within the description text.

header.description: HPE global header with logo, mega-menu navigation, search, and language selector. Sticky on scroll.

footer.description: HPE global footer with logo, action links, social media icons, animation toggle, 5-column navigation, copyright bar, and language selector.
